memory_entries.text: Furniture forecasting lesson after 2033 feedback: prior manual decay model scored high (0.944) but underpredicted 2033 high-growth categories in New York and Brass End Tables (NY Accent +163, NY Brass +169, SF Brass +168). Use feedback actuals as the full target base when refreshed CSVs are sparse/incomplete; treat Accent and Brass momentum as stronger than earlier decay assumptions.

Furniture forecasting lesson after 2034 feedback: 2034 actual base for targets is SF/NY/CHI King 245/233/243, Accent 1786/1661/1405, Bookcase 472/414/544, Brass 2154/2440/1807, Desk 530/702/638. Backtests on 2027-2034 one-step forecasts favored avg3/CAGR for King, median3 for Accent/Bookcase, CAGR/avg2 for Brass, avg3/CAGR for Desk; avoid overreacting to single-year dips, but moderate categories after overpredictions.

Furniture forecasting lesson after 2036 feedback: updated complete 2036 actuals are SF/NY/CHI King 340/288/303, Accent 2726/2639/2162, Bookcase 616/552/628, Brass 3287/3842/2855, Desk 666/789/762. Prior 2036 high-scoring model nailed Brass with ~21-22.5% growth but underpredicted SF King, SF/CHI Accent, Bookcase and SF/CHI Desk; for 2037 keep Brass momentum ~24%, Accent ~23-25%, Bookcase/Desk moderately higher than prior, and avoid extrapolating SF King one-year spike too aggressively.
